Expect evidence patterns common to this archetype: ablations, analysis_experiments, baselines.
avoid_conditions: Avoid Observation -> Method when the target paper lacks the evidence pattern required by its selected trajectory.
Avoid when the selected exemplar's central persuasion move would force invented results or citations.

adaptation_rules: Reuse role order and evidence burden, not exemplar wording.
Drop or qualify trajectory moves whose required assets are unavailable.
Route structural changes back to trajectory-compiler before slot filling.
Expect evidence patterns common to this archetype: ablations, analysis_experiments, baselines.
avoid_conditions: Avoid Theory -> Algorithm when the target paper lacks the evidence pattern required by its selected trajectory.
Avoid when the selected exemplar's central persuasion move would force invented results or citations.

adaptation_rules: Reuse role order and evidence burden, not exemplar wording.
Drop or qualify trajectory moves whose required assets are unavailable.
Route structural changes back to trajectory-compiler before slot filling.
Expect evidence patterns common to this archetype: ablations, analysis_experiments, baselines.
avoid_conditions: Avoid Algorithm + Theoretical Analysis when the target paper lacks the evidence pattern required by its selected trajectory.
Avoid when the selected exemplar's central persuasion move would force invented results or citations.

adaptation_rules: Reuse role order and evidence burden, not exemplar wording.
Drop or qualify trajectory moves whose required assets are unavailable.
Route structural changes back to trajectory-compiler before slot filling.
Expect evidence patterns common to this archetype: analysis_experiments, baselines, ablations.
avoid_conditions: Avoid Framework Unification when the target paper lacks the evidence pattern required by its selected trajectory.
Avoid when the selected exemplar's central persuasion move would force invented results or citations.

adaptation_rules: Reuse role order and evidence burden, not exemplar wording.
Drop or qualify trajectory moves whose required assets are unavailable.
Route structural changes back to trajectory-compiler before slot filling.
Expect evidence patterns common to this archetype: analysis_experiments, baselines, ablations.
avoid_conditions: Avoid Benchmark / Dataset Construction when the target paper lacks the evidence pattern required by its selected trajectory.
Avoid when the selected exemplar's central persuasion move would force invented results or citations.

adaptation_rules: Reuse role order and evidence burden, not exemplar wording.
Drop or qualify trajectory moves whose required assets are unavailable.
Route structural changes back to trajectory-compiler before slot filling.
Expect evidence patterns common to this archetype: analysis_experiments, baselines, ablations.
avoid_conditions: Avoid Empirical Analysis when the target paper lacks the evidence pattern required by its selected trajectory.
Avoid when the selected exemplar's central persuasion move would force invented results or citations.

adaptation_rules: Reuse role order and evidence burden, not exemplar wording.
Drop or qualify trajectory moves whose required assets are unavailable.
Route structural changes back to trajectory-compiler before slot filling.
Expect evidence patterns common to this archetype: ablations, analysis_experiments, baselines.
avoid_conditions: Avoid Model Architecture Design when the target paper lacks the evidence pattern required by its selected trajectory.
Avoid when the selected exemplar's central persuasion move would force invented results or citations.

adaptation_rules: Reuse role order and evidence burden, not exemplar wording.
Drop or qualify trajectory moves whose required assets are unavailable.
Route structural changes back to trajectory-compiler before slot filling.
Expect evidence patterns common to this archetype: analysis_experiments, baselines, ablations.
avoid_conditions: Avoid New Task Formulation when the target paper lacks the evidence pattern required by its selected trajectory.
Avoid when the selected exemplar's central persuasion move would force invented results or citations.

adaptation_rules: Reuse role order and evidence burden, not exemplar wording.
Drop or qualify trajectory moves whose required assets are unavailable.
Route structural changes back to trajectory-compiler before slot filling.
Expect evidence patterns common to this archetype: ablations, analysis_experiments, baselines.
avoid_conditions: Avoid Comparative Analysis when the target paper lacks the evidence pattern required by its selected trajectory.
Avoid when the selected exemplar's central persuasion move would force invented results or citations.
